extortion.description: NEINVER is Europe’s second-largest outlet centre operator (ICSC 2012), managing 15 centres totaling 311,600 sqm of GLA under The Style Outlets and FACTORY brands. Recognized by leading international brands as the second most trusted outlet manager (Ecostra-Magdus 2013), the company oversees 500,000 sqm of retail space, 2,000 stores and more than 900 premium brands across Spain, Italy, France, Germany, Portugal and Poland. With 45 years of experience, NEINVER is a leading international property company specializing in development, asset management and fund management.
